title: सत्यनारायण चालीसा
devanagariText:
॥ दोहा ॥
सत्यनारायण प्रभु के, चरणन में प्रणाम।
चालीसा कहूँ भक्ति से, पूरो सब मनोकाम॥
सत्य स्वरूप जगतपति, विष्णु अनंत अपार।
करो कृपा दासन पर, हरो भवन का भार॥

॥ चौपाई ॥
जय सत्यनारायण भगवाना।
सत्य स्वरूप प्रभु सुजाना॥
विष्णु अवतार तुम कहलाये।
सत्य धर्म जग में फैलाये॥
कलियुग में प्रकट भगवाना।
ब्राह्मण बूढ़ा रूप सुजाना॥
पर्णशाला में कथा कहाई।
सत्यनारायण व्रत बतलाई॥
पूर्णिमा को व्रत करें सुहाना।
सत्यनारायण कथा पुराणा॥
केले का प्रसाद सजाये।
पंचामृत से पूजा करायें॥
सत्यनारायण कथा में पाँच अध्याय।
प्रत्येक कथा शिक्षा बतलाय॥
निर्धन ब्राह्मण को धन दीन्हा।
व्रत करके सुख अपार लीन्हा॥
लकड़हारा धनी बनाया।
सत्यनारायण ने सुख छाया॥
साधु वैश्य को राज दिलाया।
व्रत प्रभाव ने सुख बरसाया॥
लीलावती उल्का वैश्यानी।
प्रसाद त्यागा बड़ी हानी॥
कलावती ने प्रसाद न लीन्हा।
पति नाव सहित डूबा कीन्हा॥
पुनः व्रत कथा जब सुनाई।
पति की नाव सहित फिर आई॥
सत्य का मार्ग सदा अपनावे।
सत्यनारायण कृपा सदा पावे॥
झूठ कपट से दूर रहीजे।
सत्य वचन का व्रत करीजे॥
पूर्णिमा को पूजा करिये।
कथा श्रवण भक्ति भाव धरिये॥
परिवार सहित पूजन कीजे।
सत्यनारायण दर्शन लीजे॥
गृह प्रवेश विवाह में पूजें।
सत्यनारायण कथा न दूजें॥
सन्तान प्राप्ति में व्रत करें।
मनोकामना पूर्ण होय भरें॥
नौकरी व्यापार में सफलता।
सत्यनारायण देते शुभता॥
रोग निवारण शत्रु विनाशन।
सत्यनारायण सब सुख पोषण॥
धन धान्य सम्पत्ति बढ़ावें।
सत्यनारायण सुख बरसावें॥
जो व्रत करे मन श्रद्धा से।
सो फल पावे विश्व प्रभा से॥
सकल मनोरथ पूरण होवें।
कष्ट दरिद्र सब दूर खोवें॥
चालीसा सत्यनारायण गावे।
सो सब सुख सम्पदा पावे॥
भक्ति भाव से पाठ करीजे।
सत्यनारायण कृपा प्राप्त कीजे॥
नित प्रति पाठ जो कोई गावे।
सो वैकुण्ठ धाम सुख पावे॥
सत्य मार्ग पर चलते जाओ।
सत्यनारायण का गुण गाओ॥

॥ दोहा ॥
सत्यनारायण चालीसा, पढ़े सुने जो कोय।
सत्य मार्ग पर चलत रहे, सब मंगल शुभ होय॥
transliteration:
|| Doha ||
Satyanarayan Prabhu Ke, Charanan Mein Pranam.
Chalisa Kahun Bhakti Se, Puro Sab Manokam.
Satya Swaroop Jagatpati, Vishnu Anant Apar.
Karo Kripa Dasan Par, Haro Bhavan Ka Bhar.

|| Chaupai ||
Jai Satyanarayan Bhagwana.
Satya Swaroop Prabhu Sujana.
Vishnu Avatar Tum Kahlaye.
Satya Dharm Jag Mein Failaye.
Kaliyug Mein Prakat Bhagwana.
Brahman Boodha Roop Sujana.
Parnshala Mein Katha Kahai.
Satyanarayan Vrat Batlai.
Purnima Ko Vrat Karen Suhana.
Satyanarayan Katha Purana.
Kele Ka Prasad Sajaye.
Panchamrit Se Puja Karaye.
Satyanarayan Katha Mein Panch Adhyay.
Pratyak Katha Shiksha Batlay.
Nirdhan Brahman Ko Dhan Dinha.
Vrat Karke Sukh Apar Linha.
Lakadhaara Dhani Banaya.
Satyanarayan Ne Sukh Chhaya.
Sadhu Vaishya Ko Raj Dilaya.
Vrat Prabhav Ne Sukh Barsaya.
Leelavati Ulka Vaishyani.
Prasad Tyaga Badi Hani.
Kalavati Ne Prasad Na Linha.
Pati Nav Sahit Dooba Kinha.
Punah Vrat Katha Jab Sunai.
Pati Ki Nav Sahit Phir Aai.
Satya Ka Marg Sada Apnave.
Satyanarayan Kripa Sada Pave.
Jhooth Kapat Se Door Rahije.
Satya Vachan Ka Vrat Karije.
Purnima Ko Puja Kariye.
Katha Shravan Bhakti Bhav Dhariye.
Parivar Sahit Pujan Kije.
Satyanarayan Darshan Lije.
Grih Pravesh Vivah Mein Pujen.
Satyanarayan Katha Na Dujen.
Santan Prapti Mein Vrat Karen.
Manokamna Purn Hoy Bharen.
Naukri Vyapar Mein Saflata.
Satyanarayan Dete Shubhta.
Rog Nivaran Shatru Vinashan.
Satyanarayan Sab Sukh Poshan.
Dhan Dhanya Sampatti Badhave.
Satyanarayan Sukh Barsave.
Jo Vrat Kare Man Shraddha Se.
So Phal Pave Vishwa Prabha Se.
Sakal Manorath Puran Hove.
Kasht Daridra Sab Door Khove.
Chalisa Satyanarayan Gave.
So Sab Sukh Sampada Pave.
Bhakti Bhav Se Path Karije.
Satyanarayan Kripa Prapt Kije.
Nit Prati Path Jo Koi Gave.
So Vaikunth Dham Sukh Pave.
Satya Marg Par Chalte Jao.
Satyanarayan Ka Gun Gao.

|| Doha ||
Satyanarayan Chalisa, Padhe Sune Jo Koy.
Satya Marg Par Chalat Rahe, Sab Mangal Shubh Hoy.
hindiMeaning:
सत्यनारायण प्रभु के चरणों में प्रणाम। भक्ति से चालीसा कहता हूँ, सब मनोकामनाएँ पूरी करो। सत्य स्वरूप जगतपति विष्णु अनंत अपार, दासों पर कृपा करो।

जय सत्यनारायण भगवान! सत्य स्वरूप प्रभु! विष्णु अवतार, सत्य धर्म जग में फैलाया। कलियुग में बूढ़े ब्राह्मण का रूप धरकर प्रकट हुए।
benefits: Essential prayer for Satyanarayan Katha and Purnima Vrat
Traditionally recited for fulfillment of wishes and removes all obstacles from life
Invokes the blessing of wealth, prosperity, and family happiness
Recommended for griha pravesh, vivah, and other auspicious occasions
Strengthens the path of truth and righteousness
description: The 40 chaupais give the Chalisa its name (chalis = forty); framing dohas bring the full recitation to 43 verse-units. Among the most cherished prayers to Lord Vishnu, Satyanarayan Chalisa (सत्यनारायण चालीसा) stands as a sacred 40-verse devotional hymn. This revered text originates from Traditional Chalisa Sangrah. Devotees recite this prayer to fulfill all wishes and remove all obstacles from life and bestow wealth, prosperity, and family happiness. It is also said to strengthen the path of truth and righteousness. Recitation is particularly auspicious on Thursday (Guruvar) and during Purnima and Satyanarayan Puja. With 42 verses and a reading time of about 15 minutes, this prayer is ideal for both daily worship and special occasions. On this page, you can read the complete Satyanarayan Chalisa in Devanagari Sanskrit with English transliteration, Hindi meaning (arth), and free PDF download for offline recitation.
seoDescription: Satyanarayan Chalisa in Hindi with English transliteration and meaning. Prayer for Satyanarayan Puja Vrat on Purnima for wealth and fulfillment.

seoFaqs.question: Who is Satyanarayan and how does he relate to Vishnu?
seoFaqs.answer: Satyanarayan literally means 'Truth-Narayan' — a specific form of Lord Vishnu invoked as the embodiment of Satya (truth) and the keeper of vows. The Satyanarayan Vrat Katha appears in the Reva Khanda of the Skanda Purana, where Narada hears the vrat from Vishnu himself. Satyanarayan worship is uniquely cross-sectarian: observed by Vaishnavas, Smartas, and even non-Vedic communities.

seoFaqs.question: When should the Satyanarayan Chalisa and Vrat be performed?
seoFaqs.answer: Purnima (full moon day) of every month is the traditional time, especially Kartik, Vaishakh, Shravan and Magh Purnima. The vrat is also performed on Ekadashi, Sankranti, after weddings, housewarmings (Griha Pravesh), business openings, child-naming, and to fulfil any sankalp. Many families do it monthly without a specific cause as a continuous prosperity vrat.

seoFaqs.question: What is the standard Satyanarayan Puja sequence?
seoFaqs.answer: The puja sequence is: Sankalp, Ganesh-Gauri puja, Navagraha and Panchadeva sthapana, Satyanarayan dhyana and shodashopachara, recitation of all five chapters of the Satyanarayan Vrat Katha, Satyanarayan Chalisa path, 'Om Jai Lakshmiramana' aarti, and distribution of panchamrit-sapatashali (a sweetened mix of banana, ghee, sugar, milk, wheat flour) as prasad.

seoFaqs.question: Why are five chapters of katha read during Satyanarayan puja?
seoFaqs.answer: The Satyanarayan Vrat Katha has five adhyayas, each illustrating consequences of keeping or breaking the vrat: Narada's question to Vishnu, the poor brahmin's prosperity, the woodcutter's transformation, the merchant Sadhu Vaishya's tale (and his son-in-law's punishment for breaking the vrat), and King Tungadhwaja's experience. Together they teach that prosperity from Satyanarayan must be received with gratitude and shared via prasad.

seoFaqs.question: What is the connection between Satyanarayan Chalisa and the Aarti 'Om Jai Lakshmiramana'?
seoFaqs.answer: The Chalisa is the 40-verse stuti recited during the path-paath portion of the puja, while 'Om Jai Lakshmiramana Hari, Swami Jai Lakshmiramana' is the closing lamp-offering aarti. 'Lakshmiramana' (the beloved of Lakshmi) is Vishnu, and the aarti emphasises Satyanarayan's role as the giver of wealth, progeny and moksha. The full sequence is: Katha then Chalisa then Aarti.
